def positive_cli_only_dependency_imported_by_library_entry_module():
    rule_id = "cli_only_dependency_imported_by_library_entry_module"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag library entry modules that pull in CLI-only dependencies on import."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
